description: This file defines a class 'CognitoUserManagementService' that manages user operations in AWS Cognito, including creating, retrieving, updating, enabling/disabling, and deleting users. It also defines a 'UserInfo' class to represent user data.

classes.name: CognitoUserManagementService
classes.description: A service class for managing Cognito users, extending an abstract user management class.

classes.name: UserInfo
classes.description: A data class representing user information with attributes like username, role, email, status, enabled, created, and modified dates.

methods.name: create_user
methods.description: Creates a new user in Cognito and adds them to a specified group.

methods.name: get_users
methods.description: Retrieves a list of users in a specified Cognito user group.

methods.name: get_user
methods.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific user, validating tenancy before access.

methods.name: update_user
methods.description: Updates user attributes such as email and role after validating tenancy.

methods.name: disable_user
methods.description: Disables a user account after tenancy validation.

methods.name: enable_user
methods.description: Enables a user account after tenancy validation.

methods.name: delete_user
methods.description: Deletes a user from Cognito after tenancy validation.
